name: Five Pounds of Chocolate Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first three ingredients in a large bowl and set aside.
2. In a Dutch oven buttered with melted butter, combine sugar and evaporated milk over medium heat. Cook until it reaches the soft ball stage (234°F) or registers on a candy thermometer.
3. Pour the hot mixture over the chocolate mixture.
4. Beat at high speed using an electric mixer or wooden spoon until thickened and begins to lose its gloss.
5. Stir in vanilla extract and chopped pecans.
6. Spread fudge evenly into a buttered jellyroll pan (15 x 10 x 1 inch).
7. Chill until firm.
8. Store the fudge in an airtight container at room temperature.
